name: Threshold-shift conditions
summary: Conditions named Thresh<StatName> dynamically shift the trigger thresholds of <StatName>. Higher value = more tolerance before consequences fire. The standard mod-friendly handle for need suppression.
modderHint: Edit the cond-string value on a Loot entry granting the threshold (strType: condition, aCOs entry like ThreshStatGrav=1.0x0.03125).

name: CondOwner — what holds conditions
summary: Anything in the game that can carry conditions: a character, a furniture item, the ship itself, even abstract anchors. CondOwners live in condowners/ (large folder).

name: Conditions
summary: Named state flags or stats held by CondOwners. Can be permanent (Is<X>), continuous (Stat<X>), or threshold-shift (Thresh<X>). Most modding work touches conditions either directly or via Loot grants.

name: Condition rules
summary: Tier definitions that fire Dc<X> discomfort conditions when a stat crosses thresholds. The bridge between a numeric stat (StatHunger) and the human-readable consequence (DcHunger01 'Hungry').

name: Condition triggers
summary: Boolean tests on a CondOwner's conditions. Used by interactions to gate availability (CTTestUs / CTTestThem) and by aNext to chain effects on a condition's expiry.

name: Loot entries
summary: Grant payloads. Despite the name, Loot doesn't only spawn items — strType picks the dispatch: condition (apply conditions), item (drop items), interaction (run an interaction), trigger (fire a trigger), etc.

name: Interactions
summary: Things a CondOwner can do or have done to it. The behavior tree of Ostranauts. Live in interactions/. Chain via aInverse; gate via CTTestUs / CTTestThem; grant conditions via LootCTsUs / LootCTsThem.

name: Pledges
summary: Long-running behavioral commitments attached to characters: 'always seek food when hungry', 'attack if attacked', etc. Wired via interactions' strPledgeAdd / strPledgeRemove.

name: Installables
summary: Definitions for installing/uninstalling furniture and equipment. Each entry pairs a loose CondOwner with its installed counterpart and the construction interaction template.

name: Trait Scores — character creation costs
summary: Single entry in traitscores/ (literally Trait Scores,1) whose aValues array holds <CondName,nYears,nCost> triples for every selectable trait/skill at character creation.
modderHint: Edit position 2 of an aValues entry to change the age cost; position 1 of an aValues entry name to rename a trait at chargen (rare).

name: Starter ship selection
summary: The Loot entry the Shipbreaker career uses as its ship-encounter pool (aEventsShip). Override it to change which ships a new player can pick.

name: Sink — hygiene template
summary: Reference implementation for an installable hygiene-restoring item. Has installed (ItmSink01) and loose (ItmSink01Loose) variants plus an installable entry, install/uninstall interactions, and the SeekHygieneWater interaction chain.

name: Apathetic — example mood-suppressing trait
summary: Reference implementation: a player-selectable trait that raises the discomfort threshold of StatAchievement so the crew tolerates more 'no progress' before complaining. Pattern is condition + aPer + Loot[strType: condition].

name: Ossifex — example anti-atrophy drug
summary: Reference implementation: a drug that suppresses StatAtrophyRate for the dose duration. Useful template for any 'reduce a need's drain rate' mod.
